creator: reed@reedmedia.net
text:
On Mon, 10 Mar 2014, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Please note that PR ports/187423 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

I didn't test it. But I looked at it and it appears correct and fine. I 
am fine with having it committed. Thanks
